content: Hi, I'm CosmoLab AI. Let's run a Quality / QA-QC discovery session for your OTC drug product.
1% hydrocortisone cream — 21 CFR 211 drug cGMP, FDA OTC monograph.
API assay (HPLC), degradants, pH, viscosity, micro (USP <51>/<61>), particulate matter.
ICH Q1A — accelerated (40°C/75% RH 6 months) + long-term (25°C/60% RH 24 months). API, degradants, pH, viscosity at each timepoint.
Drug Master File (DMF) required for API. Full audit every 2 years. CoA + CoC on every lot.
I have everything I need. Type 'generate' to create your documents.
